Fastest PancakeSwap Sniper Bot

Be the first one to buy tokens at the lowest listing price in PancakeSwap or your preferred Exchange. Snipe the mempool to get in the first block as soon as liquidity is detected.

Get SnowSniper today and start making huge profits.

Buy Now

FEATURE

Mempool Sniper

SnowSniper reads the pending transactions in the mempool to detect the liquidity and buy in the first block.

PinkSale & DxSale

Tokens with pre-sale in PinkSale or DxSale are listed differently than fair launches. SnowSniper can snipe both.

Telegram Scraper

This bot is able to scan Telegram and read contracts when they are announced at the same time as they are launched.

Anti-Bot Protection

SnowSniper protects you with 3 different settings to avoid being 'rekt' by anti-bots and still buy in the first place.

Scam Protection

Not only protection for anti-bots but scams as well. You won't get into HoneyPots nor Rug-Pulls.

Fast Sell

Press any key you want and the bot will sell immediately. You can also configure a profit-percent and stop-loss.

24/7 Support

Join our telegram community if you have question/issues. We all help everybody to make profits :)

Highly Secured

Code is licensed to protect you and the community. SnowSniper is backed by the community.

#1 Sniper Bot

Become the king of PancakeSwap

In a matter of minutes you'll master the usage of the sniper bot. Super easy to set up and configure.

You don't need coding skills or a Harvard degree. Simply download and run, you get all the documentation upon buying.

SnowSniper - Fastest Bot

We decided to make the bot completely yours, therefore the license can be used in any device you want.

After completing the payment you'll receive a confirmation email containing the sniper bot and the tutorials to get it running.

ABOUT

About Us

Why is it called SnowSniper?

SnowSniper name is inspired by 'The White Death' (Simo Hayha) a military soldier known as the best sniper that has existed so far because he carefully analyzed each situation. His hunting skills allowed him to move unnoticed and know how to snipe in the snow and difficult positions.

SnowSniper wants to take his sniper discipline and effectiveness to the cryptocurrency world and get recognized to be the best sniper ever created on the blockchain knowing how to handle difficult listings and challenges in a storm of tokens.

Exchanges
Windows, Mac OS, Linux

Cross-Platform Support

SnowSniper can run in any operating system you have, be Windows, Mac OS or Linux your preference. The bot is programmed in NodeJS which means you can execute it from your terminal.

It's the same file for any OS however if you want to get the max out of the sniper we recommend a VPS close to your node. All this info is shared with you upon buying and we'll help you in our Telegram community

PARTNER

FAQ

In the shop page enter your email address and pay with MetaMask to the specified address. You receive a confirmation email upon buying. If you want to speed the bot delivery please join the telegram group and contact the admin or send an email to info@snowsniper.com

SnowSniper is backed by the community and partners, in the telegram group you can ask buyers for reviews. If you still want to be safer when using the bot you can create a new wallet and run the bot in a separate VPS.

A private node is highly recommended to maximize the speed of the bot. You can use cheap services like Quicknode or Moralis, but they are NOT as fast as a full private one. We also offer private nodes services, feel free to contact the admin in the telegram group.

The bot gets activated in your device after entering the license key the first time you execute the software. This means you get lifetime access to use it whenever and wherever you want. Please read Refund Policy stated for digital products.

Stay Connected With Us

Keep in touch with our community so you don't miss any snipe. Good lists of tokens are sent daily.
